title: Spyglass Only HUD
description: A mod that hides the Hotbar and sight in the spyglass.
body:
# Spyglass Only HUD

Ever wanted to fully immerse yourself while looking through a spyglass? This lightweight client-side mod hides **all** HUD elements when you use a spyglass, leaving only the clean spyglass overlay on your screen.

## What gets hidden

- Hotbar & selected item tooltip
- Crosshair
- Health, hunger & armor bars
- Experience bar & level
- Mount health
- Status effect icons

Everything reappears instantly when you stop using the spyglass.

## Features

- **Toggle on/off** — Disable the mod without removing it
- **Overlay scale** — Adjust the size of the spyglass overlay to your liking
- **Scroll zoom** — Scroll the mouse wheel while using a spyglass to zoom in/out (×1–×50). Resets to default when you put the spyglass away
- **In-game settings** — Press **K** (configurable) to open the settings screen, or use Mod Menu
- **Translations** — English, Russian, Ukrainian

## FAQ

**Does this mod affect gameplay?**
No. It only changes what you see on screen. No gameplay mechanics are modified.

**Is this server-side?**
No, it's fully client-side. You can use it on any server without issues.

**Can I change the keybinding?**
Yes. Go to Options > Controls > Keybinds and find the "Spyglass Only HUD" category.

**Can I change the zoom level?**
Yes. Scroll the mouse wheel while using a spyglass to zoom in or out. The zoom resets automatically when you lower the spyglass.

### Created for GF ❤️
